name: Jeff's Favorite Pizza Sauce
recipeIngredient: 28 oz Canned Progresso Plum Tomatoes, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the drained tomatoes well. Use Italian plum tomatoes, not regular canned tomatoes; the flavor is distinctively different.
2. If you cannot find Progresso Plum Tomatoes with basil, add an additional 1/2 to 1 tablespoon of basil while pureeing.
3. Place the puree mixture in a heavy saucepan.
4. Add the remaining ingredients except for the grated cheese.
5. Simmer for 1/2 hour or longer if necessary.
6. Add the grated Parmesan cheese last, during the final 10 minutes of cooking. The canned grated Parmesan is good in this recipe, as well as fresh.
7. Sauce can be frozen if needed.
Enjoy! - Jeff Duke
